description_long: This is a heavy-duty hammer with a robust, rectangular black metal head and a solid wooden handle. The head is thick and blocky, with slightly beveled edges and a flat striking surface on both ends, indicating it is designed for delivering powerful blows. The handle is straight, made of light-colored wood, and appears to be smoothly finished with a slight darkening at the base, likely from use or handling. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, with the handle securely fitted into the head. The hammer shows some surface scuffing and minor wear, especially on the metal head, suggesting it has seen practical use. This tool is suitable for demanding tasks in construction, demolition, or urban maintenance settings.
description: A heavy, block-headed black hammer with a straight wooden handle, showing minor wear and scuffing. Designed for powerful impacts in construction or urban work.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, flat striking face of the black metal head and the full width of the straight wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the rectangular thickness of the hammer head and the slim profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite striking face and the handle's back side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the head's thickness and the handle's narrow edge.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, smooth finish, slightly darkened at the base, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledge-type head, solid steel, flat striking faces on both ends, no claws or peens
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: minor scuffing and surface wear on the metal head, handle shows slight darkening at the base
